data.content: Landed on main: child/descendant beats inherit Rolling... from rolling ancestors; action column suppresses Take/Stop for inherited rolling rows; Shift+S/V/F are blocked for inherited rolling; start-session handler now blocks launching beats under rolling ancestors and lightbox header shows Rolling... instead of Take!. Gates: lint OK (warnings only), tsc OK, test OK, build still fails with pre-existing Next prerender/key issues on /_global-error and /beads.
